chosen_action.title: Guard reuse logging repair for measurement-hold and distribution-architecture reuse paths

why_this_action.summary: The execution board is empty in the current review window, so the highest-leverage action is a concrete runtime repair. Reused guard/follow-through paths were skipping fresh execution logs, which blurred whether the current cron slot actually logged a result.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: primary repo flat, external lanes saturated, use a concrete runtime repair
distribution_lane_latest.md: chosen lane is distribution_architecture_repair with empty-board churn context
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in this review window
reddit_post_analysis_latest.json: Reddit remains a suspended lane, so process repair is the truthful move
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
supporting_reasons: Fresh outbound/manual packets were already saturated or already delivered in the current review window.
A guard-pause or hold follow-through can be truthful, but each cron slot still needs its own execution log.
Without a fresh per-run log, the loop can look active while leaving ambiguous evidence about what the current slot actually did.

result.summary: Patched run.py so reused measurement-hold follow-through and distribution-architecture guard artifacts still emit a fresh execution log that points back to the reused source log, then verified the repair with focused and broader marketing test suites.
